property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Java\jdk-21.0.10\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Java\jdk-21.0.10\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\Apache\apache-maven-3.9.12\bin;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Users\vigne\scoop\shims;C:\Java\jdk-21.0.10\bin;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0\bin\;C:\Users\vigne\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311\Scripts\;C:\Users\vigne\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311\;C:\Users\vigne\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\vigne\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\vigne\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Server 8.0\bin;C:\Users\vigne\AppData\Local\Programs\Antigravity\bin;;.

testcase.name: runScenario["Login with empty password", "M_VIGNESHWARAN_2026_05_05_SmartHospital_LoginFeature"](2)
testcase.system-out: @ValidLoginWithOutline Scenario Outline: Verify login functionality for multiple user roles # src/test/resources/features/login/login.feature:58 ✔ Then an authentication error message should be displayed # definitions.LoginStepDefinition.an_authentication_error_message_should_be_displayed() ✔ And the user should remain on the login page # definitions.LoginStepDefinition.the_user_should_remain_on_the_login_page()

testcase.name: runScenario["Verify login functionality for multiple user roles", "M_VIGNESHWARAN_2026_05_05_SmartHospital_LoginFeature"](3)
testcase.system-out: @ValidLoginWithOutline Scenario Outline: Verify login functionality for multiple user roles # src/test/resources/features/login/login.feature:59 ✔ Given the user launches the application # definitions.CommonStepDefinition.the_user_launches_the_application() ✔ And clicks on the Login button # definitions.LoginStepDefinition.clicks_on_the_login_button() ✔ Then the user should be redirected to the dashboard # definitions.LoginStepDefinition.the_user_should_be_redirected_to_the_dashboard() ✔ And the role of the user in profile should "Doctor" # definitions.LoginStepDefinition.the_role_of_the_user_in_profile_should(java.lang.String) ✔ Given the user launches the application # definitions.CommonStepDefinition.the_user_launches_the_application() ✔ And the user is on the login page # definitions.LoginStepDefinition.the_user_is_on_the_login_page() ✔ When the user clicks the "Radiologist" button # definitions.LoginStepDefinition.the_user_clicks_the_button(java.lang.String) ✔ And the user is on the login page # definitions.LoginStepDefinition.the_user_is_on_the_login_page() ✔ When the user clicks the "Accountant" button # definitions.LoginStepDefinition.the_user_clicks_the_button(java.lang.String)
